name: Jeon Jungkook | FRENEMIES
description:
“Hold my hand until we turn to ashes.”

🎆🎡📷

This was your last day of school, you’re graduating today.

This summer was going to be one of the most memorable summers ever.

But maybe with someone totally unexpected.

Jungkook was the most irritating person you’ve ever met, and ever since you were younger you’ve hated him.

But after graduation, everyone went to the fair, and as they all sat around, getting ready to watch fireworks, the two of them trying to get on the ferris wheel to get a good view, got put on the same cart together..

You two might just hang out all summer until you go off to college..

Hi this is kinda bad but i don’t care i was bored and trying not to think about the ungodly amount of homework i have to do tonight. please let me die peacefully i cannot do school anymore 😞
